entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area, specifically for groundnut and cereals

entities.name: FERTILIZER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The effectiveness and optimization of fertilizer application in soil management

entities.name: TRADITIONAL CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Conventional farming methods used primarily for subsistence

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: A method to shift production from subsistence to market-oriented enterprises

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of combining groundnut with other crops in the same field

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of growing different crops in sequence to improve yield

entities.name: INTEGRATED SOIL FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An approach to optimize fertilizer use efficiency and effectiveness to improve livelihoods

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where smallholder farmers are the focus and groundnut yields are currently low

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where groundnut yields average over 2.2 tonnes per hectare

entities.name: AMERICAS
entities.description: Region where groundnut yields are close to 4 tonnes per hectare

entities.name: AFRICAN SOIL HEALTH CONSORTIUM
entities.description: Organization producing cropping guides for extension workers

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with small to medium-sized farms, primarily in Africa

entities.name: COMMERCIAL FARMERS
entities.description: Established farmers who can benefit from the cropping guide

entities.name: SUBSISTENCE
entities.description: Production of crops for personal consumption rather than for sale

entities.name: MARKET-ORIENTED ENTERPRISES
entities.description: Agricultural production focused on commercial sale and profitability
